zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stevenson於大約1638年出生在美國紐約州紐約市時，她的父親Edward Stevenson30歲，母親Anne27歲。她於1670年12月31日與John Everitt在美國紐約州紐約市昆斯艾爾爾斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1689年在美國紐約州紐約市昆斯牙買加享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stevenson于大约1638年出生在美国纽约州紐約市时，她的父亲Edward Stevenson30岁，母亲Anne27岁。她于1670年12月31日与John Everitt在美国纽约州紐約市昆斯艾爾爾斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1689年在美国纽约州紐約市昆斯牙買加享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stevenson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Steven, Stephen (see Steven ) + -son. This surname is also very common in northern Ireland (especially Antrim and Down), where it has been interchangeable with Steenson and Stinson . In North America, this surname has also absorbed various European cognates, such as Danish, Norwegian, and North German Steffensen or Stephensen ; see also Stevens .

Scottish: variant of Stevenston, a habitational name from Stevenston (Ayrshire), Stevenson in Newlands (Peeblesshire), or Stevenson in Haddington (East Lothian). The placename in each case derives from the personal name Steven + Older Scots toun ‘farmstead, settlement’.
English: habitational name from Stevenstone (Devon), meaning ‘Stephen's farmstead’.

variants.name: Stimpson
meanings: variant of Stevenson , with a progressive shortening of Steven- to Sten-, Stin-, and finally Stimp-. Compare Stenson , Stinson .
sometimes perhaps a variant of Timson with a prosthetic S-.

variants.name: Steveson
meanings: English (Derbyshire): from a shortened form of   Stevenson  .

variants.name: Stinson
meanings: English: shortened form of   Stevenson  . Compare   Steenson   and   Stimpson  .

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Scottish, English, Dutch, and North German: from the personal name Steven, from Latin Stephanus, Greek Stephanos ‘crown’. This was a popular name throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages, having been borne by the first Christian martyr, stoned to death at Jerusalem three years after the death of Christ. In North America, this surname has also absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. German Steffen , German and Polish Stefan , Slovenian and Slovak Štefan, Hungarian István (see Istvan ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see Stevens ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1683: Queens, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Queens, New York, United States 1898: Borough of Queens, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stevenson was born about 1638, in New York City, New York, United States, her father, Edward Stevenson, was 30 and her mother, Anne, was 27. She married John Everitt on 31 December 1670, in Elmhurst, Queens, New York City, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1689, in Jamaica, Queens, New York City, New York, United States, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stevenson est née environ 1638, à New York City, New York, États-Unis, son père, Edward Stevenson, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Everitt le 31 décembre 1670, à Elmhurst, Queens, New York City, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1689, à Jamaica, Queens, New York City, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stevenson um 1638 in New York City, New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Stevenson 30 und ihre Mutter Anne 27. Sie hat am 31. Dezember 1670 in Elmhurst, Queens, New York City, New York, Vereinigte Staaten John Everitt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1689 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Jamaica, Queens, New York City, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stevenson è nata il circa 1638 nel New York City, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Edward Stevenson, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anne, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Everitt il 31 dicembre 1670, nel Elmhurst, Queens, New York City, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1689, nel Jamaica, Queens, New York City, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stevensonが約1638年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイで生まれた時，父Edward Stevensonは30歳，母Anneは27歳であった。1670年12月31日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイクイーンスエルムハルストでJohn Everittと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1689年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイクイーンスジャメイカで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stevenson(이)가 대략 1638년 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Stevenson(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1670년 12월 31일 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 퀸스 엘후르스트에서 John Everitt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1689년 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 퀸스 자메이카에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stevenson nasceu aproximadamente 1638, em New York City, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Edward Stevenson, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Everitt em 31 de dezembro de 1670, em Elmhurst, Queens, New York City, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1689, em Jamaica, Queens, New York City, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stevenson родилась около 1638 г. в местности Нью-Йорк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Edward Stevenson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Everitt 31 декабря 1670 г. в местности элмхурст, куинс, Нью-Йорк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1689 г. в местности джамеика, куинс, Нью-Йорк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stevenson nació aproximadamente 1638, en Nueva York, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Edward Stevenson, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Everitt el 31 de diciembre de 1670, en Elmhurst, Queens, Nueva York, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1689, en Jamaica, Queens, Nueva York, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 52 años.
